detail: Inhale for two steps, exhale for two steps. This synchronizes diaphragm movement with foot strikes, reducing internal organ pressure on the lungs.
uae_context: During high humidity in Dubai, focus on nasal breathing to filter and cool air before it hits the lungs.

detail: Maintain a heart rate where you can still hold a conversation. This maximizes lipid oxidation (fat burning) over glucose consumption.
uae_context: Best performed at the Al Qudra Cycle Track at 5:00 AM to avoid heat-induced heart rate spikes.
